enterHelpInstructions: Enter help instructions or notes here...
notFoundMessage: The requested URL {{url}} was not found on this server.
youtubeParodyMessage: Video streaming is blocked by Corporate IT.
externalSiteNotice: Notice: Many real-world websites (like Twitter, etc.) block themselves from being embedded in games due to security headers (X-Frame-Options). If it refuses to connect, that's why!
courageMeterTitle: Courage to Steal the Boss's Job:
courageMeterDescription: The more you steal, the bolder you get. Reach 100% to take over the company.
suspicionMeterDescription: Doing real work (Emails/Stonks) lowers suspicion. Don't get caught!
deskDescription: You pretend to work, but you're actually swiping office supplies when no one is looking.
coworkerDescription: Pay your coworkers to look the other way... and steal for you.
gregslistSubtitle: your local classifieds. definitely not fenced goods.
gregslistDisclaimer: By using gregslist you agree to our terms of service which include not asking where we got this stuff.
bankSubtitle: "The protection of your data is important to you? We don't care."
availableCashDescription: Funds available for immediate withdrawal or bribery.
totalNetWorthDescription: Includes the estimated street value of your "borrowed" office supplies.
welcomeBack: Welcome back! Here's your financial overview.
composeDescription: Type the template exactly to earn your wage. Errors will dock your pay! Doing actual work drains your Courage.
emailSentFeedback: Email sent! Accuracy: {{accuracy}}%. You earned ${{reward}} but lost {{courage}}% Courage. Suspicion reduced by {{suspicion}}%.
dataEntryDescription: Transcribe the Source Data exactly into the empty spreadsheet below. Navigate cells easily using Tab, Enter, or Arrow keys. Doing actual work drains your Courage.
dataSubmittedFeedback: Data submitted! You got {{correct}} out of {{total}} correct. Earned ${{reward}} but lost {{courage}}% Courage. Suspicion reduced by 5%.
stonkSheetsDisclaimer: Note: True investment features are still pending SEC approval. Do some data entry in the meantime.
resetWarning: Warning: Resetting your progress will delete all your cash, courage, and inventory. This action cannot be undone.
resetConfirm: ARE YOU SURE? CLICK AGAIN TO WIPE SAVE.
winMessageBody1: Your courage has reached 100%. You march into the boss's office, kick him out of his chair, and declare yourself the new CEO.
winMessageBody2: You have officially stolen the ultimate item: His job.
loginError: Please enter both username and password.
